title: Adversaries
content:
He held his hands like plastic    - 
    his vestments the finer
    calling of his trade,
    vocation as modern strummer
    of Nature's laws
    Engineer in brief    - 
    wine glass in hand
    bestowing the more salient points
    of mawkish disbelief with
    cigarette to numb the spine.

    The Reverend
    looked down on fire,
    caught papryus smoke in the bellows
    of his chest,
    made laundry of
    the Plumber's intellect    - 
    tore savage parchment
    from the soft cheesecutter's
    contemporary breath.
meaning:
"Adversaries" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
